Beamline.description: An ordered sequence of beamline elements defining a beam path.

kind.description: Kind/type of the profile family or profile instance.

line.description: Ordered sequence of cross-referenced element names forming a beamline.

BeamlineElement.description: A single element in a beamline with optional physics parameter blocks.

kind.description: Kind/type of the profile family or profile instance.

length.description: Physical length of the element in meters.

profiles.description: Control profile families keyed by family name.

inherits_shared_capabilities.description: Names of shared capabilities inherited by the profile.

type_specific_capabilities.description: Type-specific capabilities declared directly in a profile, each with an id, class label, description, and signals.

ElementNaradRef.description: NARAD semantic reference block attached to a beamline element.

capability_profile.description: Cross-reference to the specific capability profile applied to this element.

capability_profile_family.description: Cross-reference to the control profile family for this element.

cavity_semantics.description: RF-cavity-domain semantic context for this element.

instrument_semantics.description: Instrument-domain semantic context for this element.

magnet_semantics.description: Magnet-domain semantic context for this element.

signal_bindings.description: Signal definitions keyed by signal name within a device type.

ElementSemantics.description: Semantic context referencing shared and type-specific capability names for a beamline element.

shared_capabilities.description: Names of shared capabilities applied to this element, referencing Capability by name.

type_specific_capabilities.description: Capability class labels (e.g. CorrectorKickCapability) identifying which type-specific capabilities apply to this element. These match the capability_class field of TypeSpecificCapability entries in the profile.

relationships.description: Relationship labels used in graph projection.

JLabParams.description: JLab-specific element parameters: type designation, accelerator model name, and open property map.

jlab_type.description: JLab-specific element type designation (e.g. WarmCavity, QW, HCorrector). Serialized as 'type' in source YAML; renamed here to avoid conflict with the LinkML metamodel 'type' designator used for polymorphic class selection.

modeled_as.description: Accelerator physics code model element type (e.g. RFCA, KQUAD, HKICK).

properties.description: Open-ended key-value property map for element-specific parameters.

TypeSpecificCapability.description: An inline capability declared within a device-type profile, with its own identifier, a semantic class label, a description, and a list of signals. Distinct from the shared capabilities referenced by name; these are profile-local definitions.

capability_class.description: Semantic class label for a type-specific capability (e.g. QuadrupoleStrengthCapability). Serialized as 'class' in source YAML; renamed here to avoid conflict with reserved keywords.

TypeSpecificCapability.title: TypeSpecificCapability

beamlines.description: Ordered list of beamlines in this NARAD document.

elements.description: Beamline element definitions (referenced by name from beamline line sequences).
